name: FIBROEPITHELIAL POLYP
definition: FIBROUS POLYP = FIBROEPITHELIOMA = VASCULAR FIBROUS POLYP = POLYPOID FIBROMA

demographics.Histo: mesodermal tumor with fibrovascular stroma covered by normal transitional cell

dominant_finding: mobile elongated cylindrical filling defect on a thin stalk
discriminating_features: mobile elongated cylindrical filling defect on a thin stalk
multilocular wormlike appearance with smooth margins
polyp may extend through bladder neck into bladder
extension into midpoint of bulbar urethra during voiding phase of cystourethrography

general: mobile elongated cylindrical filling defect on a thin stalk
multilocular wormlike appearance with smooth margins
Ureter: polyp may extend through bladder neck into bladder
extension into midpoint of bulbar urethra during voiding phase of cystourethrography
